allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); live=[f for f in d['fixtures'] if f['status'] not in \('FINISHED','SCHEDULED','TIMED','POSTPONED','CANCELLED'\)]; print\(json.dumps\(live, indent=2\)\)")

PowerShell($d = Get-Content "data\\fixtures.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $statuses = $d.fixtures | ForEach-Object { $_.status } | Sort-Object -Unique; Write-Host "Estados:" $statuses; $live = $d.fixtures | Where-Object { $_.status -notin @\('FINISHED','SCHEDULED','TIMED','POSTPONED','CANCELLED'\) }; Write-Host "En directo/otros:" \($live | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.home_team\) vs $\($_.away_team\) [$\($_.status\)]" }\))
